title: Actually 3D Enchantment Mace
description:
This pack adds visual Enchantment Variants to the Mace, that actually stack on top of each other! 
(3D Mace, 3D Enchanted Mace, 3D Enchant Mace, Mace 3D, Visual 3D Mace)
body:
![Actually 3D enchantment mace logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ed037cfb314b68814e4c0f38c8f63b3f8e4f90.png)
____ ![This resource pack adds Enchantment Dependant models to the Mace! (Images of the density Enchantment lineup) The enchantment Variants stack on top of each other, creating a total of 2880 possible combinations! (Images of fire aspect, wind burst and Mending variants) (Image of a player standing with an enchanted mace on the edge of a cliff with a text "See the gallery of more images") A VIDEO SHOWCASE: ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a4d89f06cfd5dd9265243307cf94d2afef6802e.png) ![All of the variants: (a table showcasing all of the enchantment models)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e932efaf2b100136d487e03b5b9352d21ab9923.png) ____
